---
title: '"What GoFundMe conceals: The campaigns that fail" published in *The Conversation*'
date: "2024-07-26"
categories: [writing]
---

My piece ["What GoFundMe conceals: The campaigns that fail"](https://theconversation.com/what-gofundme-conceals-the-campaigns-that-fail-234336), with Erik Schneiderhan, has been published in *The Conversation*. It draws on findings from my book [*GoFailMe: The Unfulfilled Promise of Digital Crowdfunding*](/book/) (Stanford University Press) to discuss the unsuccessful campaigns and disappointed users the platform doesn't advertise, and what this says about for-profit philanthropy in an algorithmic age.
